readme.title: Universal Sync Service
readme.description: A headless file synchronization service with plugin-based node providers and Web management console.
readme.features.title: Features
readme.features.syncPlans: Create, edit, and execute synchronization plans
readme.features.nodeProviders: Support Local Filesystem and OneDrive node providers (capability-driven)
readme.features.lifecycle: Robust sync lifecycle with Tombstone support and deletion policy guards
readme.features.webConsole: Manage service status, plans, nodes, and system configuration in Web UI
readme.setup.title: Setup
readme.testing.title: Testing
readme.testing.description: See [Testing Guide](docs/TESTING.md) for detailed test instructions.
